overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy exploring a tropical beach with turquoise water and massive overgrown ruins of ancient skyscrapers. The character walks along the shoreline through shallow water, approaches the towering vine-covered structures, and then turns to run back along the beach.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline with distant overgrown ruins

events.description: character steps from dry sand into the shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy beach toward the turquoise lagoon and distant ruins

entered.detail: tall skyscraper ruin covered in dense green vegetation and vines
cluster of ancient ruined structures overtaken by tropical vegetation
clear shallow turquoise water along the beach shore
bright white sandy beach along the waterline
group of palm trees growing on the rocky outcrop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tropical beach with the character walking along white sand toward a turquoise lagoon. In the distance, massive overgrown skyscraper ruins dominate the horizon. The character steps into the shallow clear water around the 8-second mark, continuing forward exploration.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lagoon approaching massive overgrown ruins

events.description: camera tilts upward dramatically to emphasize the scale of the towering ruins
mist or fog becomes visible around the base of the massive structures

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow turquoise water while approaching and observing the massive vine-covered skyscraper ruins

entered.detail: rocky outcrop covered in dense tropical vegetation and hanging vines
primitive wooden structure built against the cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character moves through shallow turquoise water approaching the massive ruins. The camera tilts upward to reveal the full scale of the vine-covered skyscrapers. Mist gathers around the base of the structures as the character explores the water's edge near a rocky cliff with wooden scaffolding.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach shoreline returning from the ruins

events.description: character turns 180 degrees and begins running back along the beach

agents.ego_description: turning around and running back along the beach away from the ruins toward the open shoreline

entered.detail: dark cave opening in the rocky cliff face on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character turns around and runs back along the beach, moving away from the massive ruins. A dark cave entrance becomes visible on the left rocky cliff as the character returns along the shoreline, with the ruins now receding into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a tropical shoreline that transitions from an approach toward towering ruins to a swift retreat back across the beach. It begins with the character walking across white sand toward a turquoise lagoon, with massive overgrown skyscraper ruins dominating the distant horizon. As the character steps into the shallow, clear water, the camera tilts upward to reveal the immense scale of the vine-covered structures emerging from a gathering mist near a rocky cliff with wooden scaffolding. The scene then shifts as the character turns around and runs back along the shoreline, causing the ruins to recede into the distance. Finally, the movement reveals a dark cave entrance nestled in the left rocky cliff as the character returns across the sand.
